name: The Shyft Group, Inc.
description: The Shyft Group, Inc. is a leading North American specialty vehicle manufacturer, assembly, and upfit company. Headquartered in Novi, Michigan, the company serves a diverse range of industries, including commercial, retail, and service markets. Through its portfolio of respected brands such as Utilimaster, Royal Truck Body, and Blue Arc EV, The Shyft Group provides innovative, high-quality vehicle solutions designed to improve productivity and operational efficiency. Recently acquired by the Aebi Schmidt Group, the company continues to leverage its expertise to deliver advanced specialty vehicle solutions to its global customer base.
